name: Butternut Squash Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Butternut Squash; peeled and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Par the butternut squash, remove seeds, and cut into 1-inch cubes.
2. Cook the chopped onions in butter or margarine until tender.
3. Stir in chicken broth, cubed butternut squash, sliced pears, thyme, salt, white pepper, and coriander.
4. Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat.
5. Simmer covered for 10-15 minutes, or until the squash is tender.
6. Transfer half of the soup to a food processor or blender; process until smooth. Return to the pot.
7. Process the remaining soup in batches, then return to the pot.
8. Stir in whipping cream and heat until hot.
9. Serve with sliced pear and chopped toasted pecans.
